Extension providing AsyncStream<AVPlayerItem.Status> for reactive status observation.

Player transport controls: play/pause, seek, skip, double-tap seek, chapter navigation.
Auto-hide timer for player overlay controls; manages showingControls state.
Fallback retry paths: Android client, authenticated TV client, 403 recovery, adaptive composition.

Core loading orchestration: Phase 1 (critical AVPlayer setup) and Phase 2 (background enrichment). Most complex file in codebase.
Navigation handlers: previous/next video, autoplay, end-card selection.

AVPlayer time observer and periodic checkpoint/watchtime callback setup.

Debug stats overlay: bitrate, resolution, dropped frames, buffer health.

ViewModel for RSS feed list management (add, delete, fetch).
Generic paginated browse view for channel, playlist, and search result pages.
Playlist detail view showing playlist metadata and video list.
Card view for YouTube Shorts thumbnails in grid feeds.

Main video card component: thumbnail, title, channel, duration, DeArrow overlay, context menu.
Horizontal scrollable channel avatar list.
Channel profile page: header, about, videos/playlists tabs.
Library tab: history, watch later, playlists, subscriptions, downloads.

OAuth device flow sign-in UI: code display, polling, sign-out confirmation.
SwiftUI view modifier for transient toast notification overlay.
Home feed view: category chips, video shelf rows, Shorts row, pull-to-refresh.
Custom landscape full-screen presentation container for the video player.
Renders a single WebVTT caption cue as a styled text overlay on the player.
Compact mini-player bar shown when user navigates away from full player.

UI for adding a new RSS feed URL to the feed list.
UI for managing (delete/reorder) existing RSS feed subscriptions.
Feed browser for RSS-sourced video lists.
App root TabView: Home, Search, Library, Settings tabs with deep-link routing.
Search UI: query input, filter chips, results grid, search history.
Settings screen: all user preferences, sign-in/out, SponsorBlock config, download settings.
Reusable SwiftUI view modifiers and utility extensions (conditional modifiers, etc.).
UserDefaults-backed app settings model: all toggles, quality caps, language preferences.
Protocol marker for subsystems that can be reset on sign-out.
Value type representing an audio track (id, language, displayName, isDefault).
Generic browse ViewModel: paginated fetch, continuation token, category chip state, deduplication.
WebVTT caption track model: URL, language, kind; includes WebVTT parser.
Manages WebVTT caption fetch, cue lookup by time, and active track selection.
Persists the current playback queue (video list + index) across app restarts.
ActivityKit attributes struct for the download Live Activity.
NotificationCenter-based events for feed data changes (used to refresh UI after background fetch).
HTML parser extracting YouTube video links from og:url and canonical meta tags.
Home feed ViewModel: category chip selection, section ordering, Shorts section injection.
InnerTube /browse endpoint: home feed, search results, playlists, continuations.
InnerTube /channel endpoint: channel videos, playlists, about, membership info.
URLSession networking layer: request construction, response decoding, retry logic, error mapping.
InnerTube /player endpoint: stream format resolution, tracking URL fetch, watchtime reporting.
InnerTube playlist CRUD: add/remove videos, create/delete playlists.
InnerTube social actions: like, dislike, subscribe, comment, report.
Text extraction helpers: extractText(), extractNumber(), parseRelativeDate(). Critical: extractNumber() has K/M/B suffix bug.
InnerTube video renderer parsers: parseVideoRenderer, parseLockupViewModel, parseTileRenderer, parseReelItemRenderer. Largest source file after PlaybackViewModel+Loading.
Root InnerTubeAPI actor: manages authToken, API key, URLSession, client configuration.
Protocol defining the InnerTubeAPI interface used by ViewModels (testability seam).
Enum of InnerTube client types (iOS, Android, tvOS, web, AndroidVR) with credential selectors.
InnerTube response model types: PlayerInfo, StreamFormat, AdaptiveFormat, TrackingURLs.
Local channel model for offline subscription tracking.
In-memory cache for locally-fetched subscription feed videos.
Fetches subscription videos by polling each channel's RSS feed in parallel.
Persists user's local channel subscriptions (separate from YouTube account subscriptions).
ViewModel for playlist detail page; loads playlist items via QueuedPlaylistLoader protocol.
Model type for RSS feed metadata (URL, title, channel ID).
Persists RSS feed subscriptions list to UserDefaults.
Generic exponential backoff retry helper with configurable delay and error classification.
Search filter model: sort order, upload date, duration, type, features filter chips.
Value type for a search history entry (query string + timestamp).
Persists recent search queries for auto-complete display.
Search ViewModel: query state, debounced fetch, filter application, history management.
State management for Shorts vertical paging: current index, prefetch window.
Fetches SponsorBlock segment data from the SponsorBlock API for a given video ID.
Manages SponsorBlock skip logic: evaluates time-based segment boundaries and triggers skips.
Human-readable time formatting (seconds to h:mm:ss string).
Actor managing OAuth token lifecycle: Keychain read at init, AsyncStream for token updates (.refreshed/.signedOut).
Resolves arbitrary YouTube URLs (watch, shorts, channel, playlist) to Video model objects.
Protocol providing default Codable load/persist to UserDefaults; eliminates boilerplate across stores.
Central Video value type: id, title, channelId, thumbnails, duration, isShort, viewCount, DeArrow overlay fields.
Disk-backed cache for Video preload data (nextInfo, endCards, sponsorSegments, deArrow). LRU eviction at 20MB.
InnerTube video group parser: shelf groups, continuation tokens, section types.
In-memory + disk prefetch cache with SWR semantics, priority queue, network throttling, in-flight coalescing.
Persists per-video watch progress and resume position.
os.Logger instances for structured logging across ViewModels.
Tracks elapsed watch time and fires periodic checkpoint pings to YouTube tracking URLs.
Hardcoded client credentials (API keys, client versions) for each InnerTube client type.
Detects YouTube URL patterns (watch, shorts, channel, playlist) and routes to the appropriate view.
Model type for YouTube RSS channel feed entry.
XMLParser-based YouTube RSS feed parser returning channel video lists.
